description: Create a Talon state-machine module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\case_timeline\ that buffers spoken dates, actors, and events to be written to a chronologically sorted timeline CSV. Implement a Python script (timeline_state.py) that defines a Talon Module with internal state for date, actor, and event, exposing actions user.timeline_set_date(date_str), user.timeline_set_actor(actor_str), user.timeline_set_event(event_str), and user.timeline_commit(). The commit action must ensure all fields are populated (triggering an app notification error if not), append the entry to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\master_timeline.csv, sort all data rows chronologically under the header 'Date,Actor,Event', overwrite the CSV, clear the state, and notify the user of the save. Finally, create a timeline.talon file mapping the voice commands "timeline date <user.text>", "timeline actor <user.text>", "timeline event <user.text>", and "timeline commit" to these actions.
